title: The eight most astounding stats of MLB's season start
content: It's hard to know which numbers to trust this time of year. Here are the ones that we do -- and don't -- believe in.

title: Early MLB 2026 trade deadline preview: Player most likely to be traded for all 30 teams
content: From major league stars to prospects to if-all-goes-wrong candidates, here's who could be made available for trades.

title: Cowboys won't talk long-term deal with Pickens
content: The Cowboys will not discuss a long-term contract with George Pickens and want him to play this season on the franchise tag, executive Stephen Jones said Wednesday.

title: Chelsea fires coach Rosenior amid historic slump
content: Chelsea have sacked head coach Liam Rosenior following the club's damaging defeat to Brighton on Tuesday.

title: Padres find rotation help, sign free agent Giolito
content: Free agent right-hander Lucas Giolito, who went unsigned after declining his end of a $19M option with the Red Sox, has reached a one-year deal with the Padres.

title: Sources: NFL prospect Banks eyes June clearance
content: Florida's Caleb Banks, one of the top defensive tackles in this year's NFL draft, is expected to be fully cleared for football activities in early June after offseason foot surgery, sources tell ESPN.

title: WNBA to broadcast record 216 games nationally
content: The WNBA's 2026 schedule will feature a record of 216 games and tentpole events that'll be nationally broadcast, the league announced on Wednesday.

title: Murauskas to join ex-Saint Mary's coach at ASU
content: Paulius Murauskas' former coach at Saint Mary's recently joined Arizona State, and the 6-foot-8 forward said Wednesday that he was following.

title: Pens' Crosby: 'Urgency is heightened' down 0-2
content: Sidney Crosby said "the urgency is heightened" for the Penguins after the Flyers won the first two games of their first-round playoff series.

title: Royals, Hallmark unveil downtown ballpark plan
content: The Royals and Hallmark Cards announced they are teaming up to build a new ballpark in downtown Kansas City that would surround mixed-use development.

title: 💰 NFL draft faces a new insider betting risk
content: Former NFL execs say it's only a matter of time until someone parlays inside information on the draft.

title: Schrager projects all 32 first-round picks: Four huge trades dominate his final NFL mock draft
content: Could teams jump all around Round 1 and shake things up? Will Jeremiyah Love and Sonny Styles go in the top five? Here's what Peter Schrager is hearing and predicting.

title: NFL draft eve buzz: Everything we're hearing on the top-10 picks, possible trades in Round 1
content: Where are the Jets, Cardinals, Titans and Giants leaning with top-five picks? Will the Rams be a wild card?

title: Don't panic, Detroit! The five reasons to still trust the Pistons this postseason
content: Game 1 didn't go Detroit's way on Sunday, but there are still a lot of reasons to trust these young Pistons.

title: How the Magic avoided disaster and turned things around
content: Orlando's surge began with a three-minute highlight reel that reignited it in the play-in tournament.

title: Our cheat sheet to the 2026 NFL draft: The prospects, team needs and sleepers you need to know
content: Who are the biggest sleepers and top QBs? Who is set to get picked early? Here's the ultimate guide to this year's NFL draft, including predictions and buzz.

title: OKC's Jared McCain can hoop, but he's also famous for his viral dance moves
content: The 22-year-old guard out of Duke has built a social media empire since first posting a video on Feb. 6, 2020.

content: Here's a preview of Wednesday's three games, along with stat leaders and a look back on Tuesday's OT-filled evening.

content: How did the 15 WNBA franchises do with their offseason moves, including the draft? We rank them into four tiers.

title: The biggest question facing every WNBA team in training camp
content: How will Angel Reese fit the Dream? Will the Wings return to the playoffs? Can Caitlin Clark remain healthy?

title: If the Premier League did an NFL-style draft, who would each team select?
content: In the spirit of NFL draft week, we created a Premier League version with all the drama and intrigue of the real thing.

title: Could Cristiano Jr. play with Ronaldo? It wouldn't be soccer's first father-son pairing
content: Cristiano Ronaldo could yet break new ground by playing first-team football with his son, Cristiano Jr.

title: Men's Bracketology: Florida debuts as No. 1 overall seed for 2026-27
content: The Gators return their leading scorer to top the first forecasted field for next season's NCAA tournament.

title: Jarrell Miller and a viral toupee-fueled comeback
content: Jarrell "Big Baby" Miller waited 15 years for the world to know him. He could never have imagined how that moment would arrive as he fights for a title shot.

title: Vrabel: I had 'difficult' talks over Russini photos
content: Mike Vrabel said the Patriots and their fans will get "the best version of me going forward" after the New York Post published photos that appeared to show the coach embracing and holding hands with former Athletic reporter Dianna Russini.

title: Meet Prospect X, who could be the 2026 NFL draft's brightest diamond in the rough
content: After months of searching, we've found the prospect we believe is the 2026 NFL draft's best-kept secret.

title: The Draft Day Predictor settles big Round 1 debates
content: Our analytics model crunches the numbers on Ty Simpson, Jeremiyah Love and how four NFL teams should approach their first-round picks.

title: 'It's 100 or die': How throwing 100 mph went from a novelty to the norm in MLB
content: Hitting 100 mph on the radar gun is a badge of honor. Here's why the number of pitchers who have reached it has exploded.

title: The mental toll of injury nightmares that threaten players' World Cup dreams
content: With the World Cup less than two months away, many players are in a race against time to recover from injury for soccer's showpiece event.

title: Ice melts: Drake seemingly trolls Caleb Williams during 'Iceman' album rollout
content: The Canadian rapper posed in front of blocks of ice while wearing a Green Bay Packers jacket during his "Iceman" album rollout.

title: Men's college basketball buzz: State of blue blood rebuilds
content: North Carolina awaits a decision from Henri Veesaar while Kansas and Kentucky vie for the No. 1 recruit.

title: Women's transfer rankings: No. 1 Audi Crooks commits to Oklahoma State
content: Audi Crooks is headed to Oklahoma St., Jordan Lee is bound for South Carolina and Kymora Johnson is staying at U.Va.

title: WrestleMania 42 Night 2 takeaways: Will Reigns make this title run alone?
content: Roman Reigns is champion once again, but what should fans expect in the latest title reign of the OTC?

title: Heavyweight burning question: Tom Aspinall vs. Francis Ngannou?
content: Curtis Blaydes vs. Josh Hokit restored the feeling around heavyweight MMA, but is Hokit's run sustainable?

title: Women's boxing divisional rankings: New No. 1s at super middleweight and atomweight
content: Shadasia Green loses her top spot at 168 pounds; an unbeaten fighter takes over at atomweight. Here are the latest ESPN divisional rankings.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Man United in for Juventus midfielder
content: Manchester United are interested in signing Juventus midfielder Teun Koopmeiners. Join us for the latest transfer news and rumors from around the globe.

title: Top scorers, sleepers and streamers: Fantasy hoops outlooks for every WNBA team
content: Scouting reports and fantasy-relevant player picks from each team in the WNBA, including the two new expansions.

title: Draft guide: Rankings, strategies and more
content: Everything you need to know before your fantasy women's basketball draft, including rankings, tips and news.

title: Tamil Nadu to vote across all seats, Bengal in phase 1; can Stalin, Mamata hold their bastions?
content: West Bengal and Tamil Nadu are set for high-stakes assembly elections on April 23, with intense campaigns by national and regional parties. Over Rs 1,000 crore in inducements have been seized, and central forces are deployed in West Bengal. Key contests include Nandigram and the DMK vs. AIADMK battle in Tamil Nadu, with superstar Vijay's new party adding a twist.

title: IPL: Pant's misery deepens as LSG suffer shocking 40-run defeat to RR
content: Lucknow Super Giants suffered a shocking 40-run defeat to Rajasthan Royals after collapsing to 119 while chasing 160. Despite a strong bowling effort led by Mohammed Shami, LSG failed to handle pressure with poor shot selection. Mitchell Marsh’s 55 went in vain as wickets fell rapidly, triggered by Rishabh Pant’s dismissal. Rajasthan’s Ravindra Jadeja (43*) and Jofra Archer (3/20) played key roles in a clinical all-round win.

title: Trump cuts legal immigration 2.5x more than illegal crossings; students, H-1Bs hit
content: US legal immigration, particularly for students and skilled workers, has seen a steeper decline than illegal entries under the Trump administration. International students face increased visa hurdles and uncertainty, while H-1B visa issuances are pressured by higher fees and stricter rules. This trend risks impacting US innovation and competitiveness.

title: After $6.25B 'gift' to Trump Accounts, Michael & Susan Dell donate $750M
content: Michael and Susan Dell have pledged $750 million to the University of Texas at Austin for a new medical center and research campus. This significant donation will focus on integrating AI and advanced computing to improve patient care, research, and education. The project, expected to open by 2030, aims to enhance Austin's healthcare capabilities and advance medical innovation.

title: Is Trump's Hormuz blockade a 'success'? 34 Iran-linked tankers bypass restrictions
content: US claimed that it holds "total control" over the Strait of Hormuz, calling it a success. However, reports reveal Iran-linked tankers are bypassing these restrictions. At least 34 tankers have continued operations, with some carrying significant oil volumes. This situation creates a complex environment for global oil trade. Tensions remain high as both sides assert control over the vital waterway.

title: ‘PSL things in IPL!’ Social media erupts after Rishabh Pant’s costly error
content: Lucknow Super Giants' disciplined bowling was marred by a chaotic run-out attempt involving Rishabh Pant. A mix-up between Jadeja and Ferreira saw the latter stranded, but Pant fumbled the ball twice, allowing Ferreira to survive. This costly lapse, despite a strong bowling performance, highlights T20 cricket's unpredictable nature and the impact of missed opportunities.

title: Meta to install tracking software on American employee's machines: Here is what the memo said
content: Meta is installing new tracking software on US employees' computers to capture mouse movements, clicks, and keystrokes for AI training. This initiative aims to improve AI agents' ability to perform work tasks autonomously, like using shortcuts. Meta assures employees the data won't be used for performance reviews, only for enhancing AI models.

title: 'Bhooth Bangla' day 5: Akshay Kumar film eyes Rs. 100 crore domestic milestone
content: 'Bhooth Bangla', directed by Priyadarshan and starring Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh Rawal, Wamiqa Gabbi, Rajpal Yadav, Mithila Palkar and Asrani, is chasing the Rs. 100 crore India net milestone as it enters Day 6 of its theatrical run. With a worldwide gross of Rs. 118.12 crore, the horror-comedy has recovered strongly from its Monday dip with an 18.5% growth on Day 5. The film opened with Rs. 12.25 crore on Day 1, peaked at Rs. 23 crore on Day 3 and is now building toward a healthy first week total. Marking Akshay Kumar and Priyadarshan's reunion after 16 years, the supernatural comedy-thriller follows Arjun Acharya returning to his ancestral home to confront the demonic entity Vadhusur. Stay updated with all live Day 6 tracking, day-wise collections and the complete box office story of Bhooth Bangla.

title: Iran war: Trump sanctions waiver or not - why India continues to buy Russian oil
content: In March, with the US sanctions waiver in effect, India has aggressively procured Russian crude, picking up millions of barrels. India has never officially said that it will stop buying Russian crude, and even when levels dropped after sanctions, Russia was still the biggest contributor.

title: Weeks after Bill Gates’ plan to shut Gates Foundation; CEO sends layoff memo to staff
content: The Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation is preparing to lay off up to 500 employees, approximately 20% of its workforce, as part of a cost-control effort. This move aligns with the foundation's plan to wind down by 2045 and aims to cap operating expenses at $1.25 billion while increasing program spending to a record $9 billion in 2026.

title: Vinod Suryavanshi recalls struggle, humiliation as junior artist
content: Vinod Suryavanshi, who played the new Sachiv ji in Panchayat Season 3, recently opened up about his journey in the industry, revealing how he accidentally entered films and the struggles he faced as a junior artist. Vinod said that while the pay improved, the environment often came with humiliation. Even after moving towards acting, Vinod said he faced repeated rejection due to his appearance.

title: IRS officer's daughter murder: Accused arrested from Delhi's Dwarka
content: Delhi Police have arrested the main suspect, Rahul, in the murder of an IRS officer's daughter. The 22-year-old woman was found strangled in South Delhi, with investigators suspecting a mobile charging cable was used. The accused was apprehended at a hotel in Dwarka after being on the run.

title: Rishabh Pant’s horror run continues, dismissed for three-ball duck vs RR
content: Rishabh Pant's disappointing outing continued as he was dismissed for a three-ball duck against Rajasthan Royals, falling early in the chase. This early setback, coupled with a run-out in the first over, put immense pressure on Lucknow Super Giants. Despite a strong bowling performance restricting Rajasthan to 159, Pant's form remains a concern for LSG.

title: Dianna Russini husband under scrutiny over Mike Vrabel affair rumor claims
content: Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, and the former New York Times’ reporter and NFL insider, Dianna Russini, continue to dominate headlines as their alleged affair rumors swirl. As Dianna Russini has stepped down from her role at The Athletic, new allegations have been made about her marital life that she has always tried to keep out of the spotlight.

title: Was Hulk Hogan broke? Divorce, addictions & life after setbacks explained
content: Hulk Hogan's new Netflix docuseries, 'Hulk Hogan: Real American,' reveals his financial struggles post-divorce from Linda Hogan in 2009, where he lost a significant portion of his assets. The series also details his near-fatal fentanyl addiction, a consequence of managing pain. Hogan tragically passed away from a heart attack in July 2025.

title: Jayson Tatum returns from Achilles injury as Celtics eye playoff comeback
content: Jayson Tatum made a remarkable return to the Boston Celtics in April 2026, less than a year after rupturing his right Achilles tendon in May 2025. Despite a serious injury that typically sidelines players for an extended period, Tatum underwent prompt surgery and was back on the court for the playoffs in March 2026.

title: Gujarat-bound ship among two vessels seized by Iran near Hormuz
content: Iran has seized two ships in the Strait of Hormuz. One vessel was heading to Mundra port in Gujarat. This action escalates tensions in the vital oil chokepoint. The seizures follow recent incidents involving Indian-bound ships. The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps has taken custody of the vessels. Tensions remain high despite a ceasefire.

title: EC issues notice to Kharge over 'terrorist' remark, seeks reply within 24 hrs
content: Mallikarjun Kharge on Tuesday referred to PM Modi as a “terrorist” and later issued a clarification, in remarks expected to trigger political controversy during the ongoing election season. Kharge made the statement in Chennai at a press conference on the final day of campaigning for the Tamil Nadu assembly elections, scheduled for Thursday. He was criticising the opposition AIADMK over its alliance with PM Modi's BJP.

title: 'He’s not doing anything’: Cook wants Bethell to quit RCB mid-season
content: Former England captain Alastair Cook urges young batter Jacob Bethell to leave the IPL and return to Warwickshire. Cook believes Bethell, despite his T20 World Cup heroics, is wasting crucial development time on the bench with Royal Challengers Bengaluru. Consistent game time is vital for his progression, Cook argued, suggesting he could open for his county and aid England's future.

title: 'Mamata's Tolabazi has digital address': Amit Malviya jibes CM with 'PAY2TMC' post
content: BJP IT cell chief Amit Malviya launched a sharp attack on the Trinamool Congress, using '#PAY2TMC' and 'Tolabazi' to accuse the party of cash-for-service politics and widespread corruption. He cited wall posters in Kolkata and alleged irregularities in recruitment and public distribution systems, claiming the state's youth and poor have been 'robbed blind' ahead of the assembly polls.

title: Ali Raza scripts history, becomes youngest bowler from Pakistan to ...
content: Teen pacer Ali Raza etched his name in PSL history, becoming the youngest to claim a hat-trick. The 18-year-old achieved the feat for Peshawar Zalmi against Karachi Kings, finishing with 4/41. His spell dismantled Karachi’s lower order, restricting them despite Jason Roy’s 85. The milestone, first for Zalmi this season, highlights Raza’s immense promise and adds his name to an elite list of PSL hat-trick takers.

title: Month into new govt, Nepal home minister quits over links to bizmen under laundering lens
content: Nepal's Home Minister Sudan Gurung resigned amid scrutiny over his wealth disclosures and alleged business links with a businessman under money-laundering investigation. This marks the second ministerial setback for PM Balendra Shah's anti-corruption government within weeks, highlighting early challenges to its clean governance agenda.

title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi dismissed for 8 as RR’s top order falls apart vs LSG
content: Rajasthan Royals faced a dramatic early collapse against Lucknow Super Giants, with teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi enduring a rare failure. Mohammed Shami's early strikes and a brilliant catch by Digvesh Singh Rathi dismantled the top order. This puts immense pressure on captain Riyan Parag and Shimron Hetmyer to salvage the innings.

title: 'No grant if Congress wins': BJP MP remark triggers oppn complaint in Gujarat
content: A political storm erupted in Gujarat as BJP MP Mitesh Patel allegedly threatened to withhold development grants from Anklav if voters elect Congress nominees. The opposition has filed a complaint with the State Election Commission, accusing the MP of voter intimidation and violating the Model Code of Conduct. The remarks were made during campaign rallies for upcoming local body polls.

title: 'Can't shut our eyes to realities': SC slams Mamata's 'interference' in I-PAC raid case
content: A bench of Justices PK Mishra and NV Anjaria told the counsels arguing on behalf of the West Bengal administration which includes the CM Mamata Banerjee and other senior officials, that they may argue on abstract legal principles but the Court cannot shut it’s eye over the practical realities going on in the State.

title: IPL 2026: 4 centuries, same date! Will RR continue April 22 magic vs LSG?
content: Rajasthan Royals batters have a peculiar knack for centuries on April 22, with Watson, Rahane, Buttler, and Jaiswal all achieving the feat. Today, against Lucknow Super Giants, all eyes are on Jaiswal and Sooryavanshi to see if this remarkable trend continues. Both teams are under pressure after recent losses, making this a crucial encounter.

title: Salman Khan, Saajan and a Sri Lankan fan’s journey to Hindi and IPL
content: A childhood viewing of Saajan inspired Sri Lankan actor Shehan Malik to learn Hindi and chase Bollywood dreams. Now in India for IPL 2026, the Kegalle-born content creator reflects on discovering language through films, playing junior cricket with Kusal Mendis and Niroshan Dickwella, and experiencing India’s intense cricket fandom firsthand.

title: Cash, liquor, drugs: EC seizures in TN & WB cross Rs 1,000cr ahead of assembly polls
content: Election authorities in West Bengal and Tamil Nadu have seized over Rs 1,000 crore in poll-related inducements, including cash, liquor, drugs, and precious metals. The Election Commission deployed extensive surveillance teams to curb voter influence and ensure fair elections, while also establishing grievance committees to address public concerns.

title: 'Only one neighbour is troublesome': Rajnath's 'dot, dot, dot' warning to Pak on Pahalgam anniversary
content: Defence minister Rajnath Singh issued a stern warning to Pakistan, stating that any attempt to create trouble would be met with a strong response. He highlighted India's enhanced military strength and its shift from import dependence to becoming a defence exporter. Singh's remarks come a year after the Pahalgam terror attack.

title: Ranya Rao gold smuggling case: Actress set for release after 1 year
content: Kannada actress Ranya Rao is set for release from jail after completing a year of preventive detention under the COFEPOSA Act. Arrested in a Rs 102 crore gold smuggling case, her release was delayed despite earlier bail. The case involves alleged hawala transactions and links to the film industry and police department.

title: From chemo sessions to scoring 96.6% in Class 10 boards: Aarav Vats’ inspiring story
content: Aarav Vats scored 96.6% in the CBSE Class 10 board exams while undergoing treatment for lymphoblastic lymphoma, a rare and aggressive cancer. Behind the marks lay chemotherapy, fatigue, flexible teachers, supportive  parents and a teenager’s quiet refusal to give up — making this not just a result story, but one of grit, care and uncommon clarity.

title: 'Couldn’t even hit a four at that age': Sooryavanshi leaves Markram stunned
content: Teen star Vaibhav Sooryavanshi continues to shine in IPL 2026, earning praise from Aiden Markram for his power-hitting. Nearing 500 runs, he remains key for Rajasthan Royals ahead of their clash with Lucknow Super Giants. Both teams seek a comeback, with the Ekana pitch expected to produce a balanced, competitive contest.

title: Centre allows blending aviation turbine fuel with synthetic alternatives
content: Aviation Turbine Fuel standards have been updated to permit synthetic fuel blends, enhancing clarity amidst rising alternative fuel use.  Meanwhile, Indian Oil assures no disruption in petrol and diesel supplies across northern regions, with robust stock levels.  LPG demand has surged due to global conflicts, extending delivery times, though supply chains remain stable.

title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has ‘glimpses of Brian Lara’
content: Legendary Australian cricketer Allan Border, currently in Mumbai, lauded Rajasthan Royals' 14-year-old sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, noting his exceptional power-hitting. Border sees glimpses of Brian Lara in the young talent but stresses the importance of developing a stronger defence for a successful career. Sooryavanshi's explosive stats, including a remarkable strike rate and numerous sixes, highlight his immense potential.

title: AI-generated MAGA influencer: Indian student behind 'hot girl' profile with millions of followers
content: An India-based medical student created and operated a popular AI-generated Instagram influencer, "Emily Hart," who amassed millions of followers with patriotic and political content targeting conservative US audiences. The virtual persona, presented as a registered nurse, was monetized through merchandise and subscription platforms, generating thousands of dollars monthly before the account was removed for fraudulent activity.

title: 'US stands with India': Sergio Gor pays tribute to Pahalgam victims on first anniversary
content: US Ambassador to India condemned the Pahalgam terror attack on its one-year anniversary, reaffirming Washington's support for India's fight against terrorism. Prime Minister Modi also paid tribute, vowing that India will never bow to terror. The attack led to Indian military operations targeting terror infrastructure.

title: Bring in law to regulate use of mobile phone by children: panel
content: The Commission emphasised the need for the government to establish laws setting age limits and controlling screen time among children

title: Blue City a blend of infrastructure and environmental planning
content: The ambitious project of developing a network of reservoirs and canals in Amaravati is aimed at not only mitigating flood risks but also enhancing urban livability and tourism potential of the capital region, say officials

title: Thrissur fireworks accident: Disaster Management Department issues detailed guidelines for collection of DNA samples, burial of bodies
content: The guidelines outline detailed procedures to be followed in the case involving unidentified bodies, bodies that have been identified but not claimed, disputed identifications, and situations where only body parts have been recovered

title: Govt claims women winning unreserved panchayat seats in ‘significant numbers’
content: Parliament data show 10 States/union territories where quota percentage is exceeded, but limited to an excess of up to 5 percentage points; four States/union territories were not meeting the quota, while five had just enough

title: TN Assembly elections: Tirupattur’s Jawadhu Hills gets first green polling booth
content: Designed under the T.N. Climate Change Mission, the green polling booth consists of eco-friendly measures like coconut and bamboo leaves used for setting up shades

title: CMC College of Nursing organises graduation day in Vellore
content: R. Shankar Shanmugam, Registrar, Tamil Nadu Nurses and Midwives Council (Chennai) was the chief guest

title: 139 people cleared by tribunals after SIR exclusion allowed to vote in W.B. first phase polls
content: Inclusion is minuscule compared to 27 lakh deletions during the adjudication process, which involved over 60 lakh voters

title: Andhra Pradesh Ministers meet Singapore Home Minister Shanmugam on Day 2 of governance tour
content: Singapore Home Minister K. Shanmugam briefed the delegation on the city-state’s legal framework and policing; training sessions at NUS Cities and a visit to the Singapore City Gallery are lined up for the day.

title: M.P. farmers to get four times the market price compensation for agricultural land accusation, says CM Yadav
content: Yadav said that the move will benefit farmers whose land is acquired while also expediting the pace of various infrastructure projects, including irrigation schemes, roads, bridges, railway lines, and dams

title: More than 3.4 lakh election officials, EVMs dispatched to polling booths across T.N.
content: 3,60,068 polling personnel deployed to 75,000 polling booths as the State is set to vote today; CEO Archana Patnaik says 163 FIRs registered over social media posts violating Moral Code of Conduct

title: SP delegation en route to meet victim’s family allegedly attacked in Ghazipur
content: Locals question outside interference and politicisation of the death; Akhilesh claims Uttar Pradesh is witnessing worst phase of anarchy

title: Women’s groups seek 33% reservation in legislature
content: They accuse the BJP of using the Women’s Reservation Bill for political gain at a round table meeting in city

title: First phase of West Bengal elections - key constituencies, candidates, and important issues
content: 3.60 crore voters will decide the fate of 1452 candidates across the 152 Assembly seats spread around 16 districts of the State. Over 2400 companies of central forces have been deployed to conduct the high-stake polls.

title: 47 mandals in Andhra Pradesh record severe heatwaves, Kadapa sizzles at 44.4°C
content: Severe heatwave forecast has been issued for 95 mandals for April 23;  isolated places may witness light rain, thunderstorms and gusty winds until April 25, says IMD

title: Women’s panel chief flags lapses in sexual harassment inquiry at  Ayurvedic college
content: Complaint alleges threats to students; Internal Complaints Committee formed late and without external member, says Rayapati Sailaja

title: Congress OBC leaders want quota within women’s quota, seek rollout post caste census
content: The stance of the OBC leaders is at variance with the Congress’s  official position that has been pressing for an immediate roll out of women’s reservation law

title: 2006 Malegaon blast case: Bombay HC quashes charges against four accused
content: The case remains pending before the special NIA court and has seen a number of developments since its registration

title: Congress candidate moves SC against telecast of PM’s address
content: “The broadcast constituted a misuse of state machinery and official media for electoral gain, targeted at specific Opposition parties by name, and was delivered without any sanction, authority, or justification under Constitution or any law”

title: SHRC directs Kochi Corporation to cover open stretch of canal near Convent Junction
content: The Corporation secretary has been asked to inform the Commission of the action taken within three weeks

title: Prasar Bharati withdraws order to temporarily shift RNU from Dharwad
content: Union Minister Pralhad Joshi, who took up the issue with the competent authorities, thanks Union Minister Ashwini Vaishnaw and PM Modi

title: Mahila Congress launches postcard campaign for immediate implementation of women’s quota
content: Aims to mobilise 10 lakh women to send postcards to Prime Minister’s official residence at 7, Lok Kalyan Marg.

title: Writer’s critical remarks on Ezhuthachan spark off arguments on language, literature
content: Kerala Sahitya Akademi award-winning author Vinoy Thomas had recently given a lecture on the evolution of Malayalam language; after backlash from various quarters, the writer posted an apology on social media

title: India, Germany deepen defence ties as Rajnath Singh holds key talks with Boris Pistorius in Berlin
content: According to the Ministry of Defence, the two leaders discussed a wide range of security and defence issues with a strong emphasis on co-development and co-production of defence equipment

title: Goodwill gestures, rallies, tributes mark first anniversary of Pahalgam attack in J&K
content: Kashmir’s chief cleric Mr. Farooq said the people of J&K remember the Pahalgam victims ‘with deep sorrow’. However, he also drew attention to other massacres witnessed in Kashmir

title: Shutdowns by ethnic groups disrupt normal life in most parts of Manipur
content: Protests are being held against the April 18 killing of two Tangkhul Naga persons and  the April 7 bomb attack at Tronglaobi in which two children were killed

title: Toxic workplaces take lives of 8.4 lakh people annually: ILO report
content: Long working hours, the report says, are a critical psychosocial risk factor associated with increased risk of cardiovascular disease and stroke, which remains widespread

title: CM for speeding up land acquisition for allotment to industries
content: Prioritise industries of global repute in allotment of land besides creating necessary facilities, officials told

title: BJD expresses concern over deletion of 9.8 lakh voters’ names from list ahead of SIR in the State
content: Party urges Chief Electoral Officer to take special care to ensure that such voters are not disenfranchised

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Chengam constituency residents demand regular water supply for irrigation, job creation
content: Voters said that desilting and deepening of waterbodies, especially irrigation tanks in Assembly constituency by Water Resources Department and DRDA, has been a long-standing demand of residents in the region

title: 2006 Malegaon blasts: Why the recent verdict raises more questions
content: A probe by three separate agencies had led to two different sets of accused. All of them have been discharged now

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Interlinking of rivers remains key poll issue among voters in Polur constituency
content: More than 90 per cent of residents in the constituency depend on agriculture; however, Cheyyar river, which is a lifeline for residents in the region, remains seasonal

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Lack of infrastructure development plagues Tirumangalam constituency
content: The Tirumangalam Assembly segment has the potential to become a satellite township of Madurai. But, infrastructure development in Tirumangalam, which became a Grade 1 municipality in 2013, has been at a slow pace.

title: Tribal youth leaders prepare manifesto to highlight demands
content: ‘Tamil Nadu Tribal Youth Manifesto 2026’ was prepared by the tribal youth leaders of Tamil Nadu, and supported by activist Prathicksha and the Institute of Grassroots Governance

title: Amaravati expansion gains pace with fresh land pooling, acquisition notices
content: State issues LPS and LAAR Act notifications in Guntur and Palnadu districts, focusing on infrastructure, flood mitigation and future airport plans

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: New taluk, hospital upgrade, bus services key demands in Senthamangalam constituency
content: Home to the famous Kolli Hills, Senthamangalam constituency is considered an AIADMK stronghold, but the incumbent is from DMK; also in the fray are TVK and NTK candidates, who believe the people are ready for a change

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: In Madurai South constituency, it is Vaiko loyalist vs. BJP karyakarta
content: While Sumathi of the NTK and J.Jo Peter of the TVK are also in the fray, working hard to make a mark, the real fight appears to be between Pudur M. Boominathan and ‘Professor’  Sreenivasan, who is supported by the AIADMK, AMMK, the PMK, John Pandian’s outfit and other parties

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Thirupparankundram constituency where hillock, temple are in the thick of controversy
content: NTK’s T. Sathyadevi, Puthiya Tamilagam’s A. Sethuraman, and TVK’s R. Nirmalkumar are adding to the otherwise straight fight between V.V. Rajan Chellappa of the AIADMK and Kiruthiga Thangapandi of the DMK

title: Former DGP R. Sreelekha’s protest slogan sparks debate
content: Several social media users point to the irony of a former police officer raising slogans against the force, while others criticised the language, which was deemed disrespectful

title: Yellow, Pink metro lines to spur realty prices: Report
content: These two metro lines are expected to spur real estate development across major micro markets; 5-7 million sq.ft incremental office demand is anticipated over the next two years in CBD, SBD 2 and Electronic City areas, predicts Colliers India

title: Mumbai-Ahmedabad bullet train to get ballastless track system
content: The track system, approximately 508-km-long, consists of four main components – RC track bed, cement asphalt mortar (CAM), pre-cast track slab, and rails with fasteners

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: A two-cornered contest but a tough act for DMK at Harur constituency
content: A significant part of the constituency is under tapioca farming. There has long been a demand for captive industries to tap into the locally-grown tapioca.

title: Obama, Bush, Biden Said No To Netanyahu Iran War Plan, Trump Agreed: Ex-Top Official
content: Former Secretary of State John Kerry said that the previous US presidents did not agree to go to war with Iran because they had not "exhausted all the remedies of peaceful process".

title: Enforce 'No PUC, No Fuel' Rule Strictly: Delhi Chief Minister Rekha Gupta
content: Delhi Chief Minister Rekha Gupta on Wednesday directed officials to strictly enforce the 'No PUC, no fuel' rule in the national capital to curb air pollution.

title: Air Force Jets Conduct Precision Drills On UP's Purvanchal Expressway
content: A diverse fleet of aircraft, including Jaguar, Mirage-2000, Sukhoi-30 MKI, C-295 and AN-32, alongside Mi-17 V5 helicopter, took part in the exercise.

title: BJP Issues Show-Cause Notice To MLA Over 'Daddy' Remark, Threats To Cops
content: The action comes after Lodhi's explosive remarks targeting Karera SDOP Ayush Jakhar triggered outrage across political and administrative circles.

title: Wedding Joy Turns To Grief As 4 Of Bihar Family Drown While Taking Ganga Dip
content: According to information, Janardan Singh's daughter was married just four days ago, and the family had come to the riverbank as part of the customary ritual.

title: 'Clean Slate': Madhya Pradesh Farmer's 34 Acres Of Crops 'Vanish' Overnight
content: According to the farmer, removing crops from 34 acres manually in one night is virtually impossible. He suspects that heavy machinery - possibly a harvester -- was used under the cover of darkness.

title: Man Can't Be Made To Pay Maintenance For Child Not Biologically His: Top Court
content: The bench of Justices Sanjay Karol and N Koteshwar Singh said this will hold even if the child is born after the man's marriage to her mother. But for this rule to apply, it has to be proved that the man has not fathered the child.

title: Does More Women Voters Mean More Women MLAs In Bengal? What Numbers Say
content: Mamata Banerjee highlighted her party's record, stating that women form 37.9 per cent of Trinamool Congress MPs in the Lok Sabha and 46 per cent in the Rajya Sabha.

title: Analysis: How BJP Is Countering Trinamool's Rhetoric With Muted Campaign
content: The BJP has turned its campaign to local issues rather than mounting an attack on Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee.

title: Calcutta High Court Allows Preventive Arrests For Bengal Elections As Per Law
content: A Division Bench of the Calcutta High Court, on Wednesday, ruled that preventive arrests in view of the two-phase Assembly elections in West Bengal starting from April 23 can be done in accordance with the provisions of the prevention laws.

title: 34 Iran Tankers Slip Past US Hormuz Blockade, With Over $900 Million In Oil: Report
content: Of the 34 ships that have circumvented the blockade, at least 19 are tankers linked to Iran that have exited the Gulf. The other 15 have entered the Gulf from the Arabian Sea, heading towards Iran.

title: How every 2027 five-star college football prospect will fit
content: nearly half of the 21 five-star prospects in the latest SC Next ESPN 300 are off the board . there are six recruits ranked no. 1 at their respective positions . 11 of the class of 2027's most elite recruits, headlined by quarterback Elijah Haven . for the first time in the ESP, the top prospect landed on their college choice .

title: Can Soto's return finally bring the Mets a win?
content: fantasy baseball buzz file aims to provide fantasy managers with the intel they need as news breaks around MLB . the new york Mets expect to have Juan Soto back in their lineup tonight when they try to snap their 12-game losing streak .

title: Caleb Downs tops annual most likely Giants draft pick list
content: Jeremy Fowler traded Dexter Lawrence II for the 10th pick of the NFL draft . the top player on my most likely draft pick list has been selected by the team . this year's draft is wonky, making matters difficult . some of the best players are traditionally non-premium positions .

title: Freddie, Chelsea Freeman announce birth of fourth child, first girl
content: Freddie Freeman and his wife Chelsea announced the birth of their fourth child, London Rosemary Joy . the couple had announced the expected arrival of the new child on twitter a month earlier . "the moment we've been waiting for," the post reads .

title: How to bet the Zurich Classic of New Orleans: Should you back the Fitzpatrick pairing?
content: the Zurich Classic of new Orleans features 80 teams of two players competing over four rounds at the PGA Tour . the tournament alternates formats each day with four-ball (best ball) played in Rounds 1 and 3 and foursomes (alternate shot) played .

title: Biggest strength, weakness for college football's top 25 teams
content: Notre Dame is feeling heading into the 2026 season after missing out on the college football Playoff . the team is able to better assess what they expect to rely on and where they need to improve by the time the season begins this fall .

title: 12 straight losses … and counting? Why Mets are losing -- and if their playoff hopes are gone
content: the Mets haven't won a game since April 8 . it's the sixth game the team have lost during the 2026 season . the upcoming homestand is in danger if it doesn't go well, fans say .

title: Fantasy baseball do-over? Which players' ADP have moved most since the preseason?
content: writers: we fantasy baseballers love a good draft as much as the next person . writers: what if we all were granted a "do-over," a chance to completely redraft our teams . they say we're on the right track with the changes we'd have made, and are we on right track? writers: if you're really gung-ho with draft excitement, you can still draft a brand-new ESPN fantasy baseball team .
